title: warrenau/astronomer: version 1.1.4 release
author: Austin Warren
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Changed package from a set of functions in a script to a fully installable python package. The package is now available on PyPI. Package can also be built locally after downloading the files or cloning the repository.
steps_raw: Changed package from a set of functions in a script to a fully installable python package. The package is now available on PyPI. Package can also be built locally after downloading the files or cloning the repository.
